title: Ice and Fire Delight
description: Mod adds the integration of Ice and Fire with Farmer's Delight
body:
## 📜 Short description

  **Mod Ice and Fire Delight adds recipes from Ice and Fire items, foods: starting with ectoplasm jelly, ending with fiery hot pie, items, effects, new deals for villagers and modifies the loot of mobs from Ice and Fire.**

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**

 - **Chinese (zh_cn) translation: Littlelazy (discord: littlelazyxy)**

 - **Brazilian Portuguese (pt_br) translation: Christian Stadler (discord: chris_aso)**

 - **Spanish (es_ar) translation: amalgamadette (discord:amalgama.dette)**

 - **Artist/Spriter: amalgamadette (discord:amalgama.dette)**
 
 - **Discord server:
   https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**

- **My website - https://donne431.github.io**

- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**
   
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
